herbs.herb_desc: Acorus calamus decoction, also known as Indian sarsaparilla or vacha, is a traditional herbal remedy prepared from the roots of the Acorus calamus plant. The decoction is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and carminative properties, which may help alleviate digestive issues and reduce stress. Traditionally consumed as a tea or added to food, Acorus calamus decoction is used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and balance.
